summary: Recording quality unknown; the show elicits mixed feelings but is praised for “Walkin’ the Dog”, “Bottom > Superstition” and a contentious “Revolution” performance.
review: Fans are split on this concert – some denounce it as sloppy with Garcia “gasping for air,” while others celebrate standout moments like Walkin' the Dog, Bottom > Superstition and Revolution. No concrete comments about the tape’s source or clarity were provided, leaving the technical quality ambiguous.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews vary widely (2‑5 stars) and focus mainly on performance; with no recording details, the rating reflects a moderate overall impression.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers do not discuss soundboard vs. audience sources or audio clarity; only performance and atmosphere are mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Opinions diverge – some feel the first set has nice moments before slipping into sloppiness, while others enjoy the entire night without noting specific flow problems.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Criticized for “gasping for air” and being out of form; other reviewers dismiss this complaint.
